description: Phase 3. Research synthesized at parent 019/research/research.md §12. Exhaustive validate_document.py --type <type> exit-0 across every authored doc. Per D3, validate manually for ALL files including per-feature files under feature_catalog/01--*/*.md and per-scenario files under manual_testing_playbook/01--*/*.md (no sampling). Research §5 Q7/Q8 confirmed validator does not auto-recurse; manual recursion required for both catalog and playbook subdirectories. Primary docs already type-compliant per research iter-019; this phase is verification + per-feature/per-scenario recursion.
